_note: EXAMPLE creative-bible for a 'Bizarre Historical Events / Forgotten History' channel. Generated by creative-director after watching 3-5 outliers. Use as reference — your actual bible will differ based on the specific outliers in your niche today.

style_signature.label: retro-vhs-cinematic-with-narrator
style_signature.description: Vertical Shorts that combine sepia/desaturated AI-generated historical scenes with a dramatic male narrator voiceover. Hook opens on a closeup face with text overlay 'You won't believe...' followed by Ken Burns zooms on stills depicting the event. VHS noise grain overlay at low opacity gives a 'found footage / archival' feel. Cuts sync to music drops. Yellow-highlighted keywords pop on screen at narrative beats.

reference_outliers.what_to_borrow: Sepia color grade + Ken Burns + yellow keyword overlays

key_visual_techniques: Ken Burns slow zoom on AI-generated historical scenes (zoom 1.0x -> 1.15x over scene duration)
VHS noise grain overlay at 15% opacity
Bottom-third dark gradient to anchor text overlays
Yellow-highlighted keywords pop on hook + twist moments
Hard cuts on music drops (no fades)
Final 3 seconds: text-only outro with CTA 'Follow for more lost history'

characters._note: No on-screen character. Narrator voice carries the story.

thumbnail_style.pattern_description: Cinematic sepia historical scene as background, big yellow Impact text top with 3-5 words, red arrow pointing to the key subject. High contrast.
